description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.26.2 adds an optional always-on-top Floating Bar for provider capacity, adds Floating Bar display settings, fixes Settings Quit so it only closes the Settings window, and hardens Floating Bar updates/window creation on Windows.
